name: Precision Shot
description: Take a lined-up shot with a firearm or ranged tool.

name: Command Bark
description: A sharp order that steadies allies and rattles cowards.

name: Rift Lance
description: A focused micro-singularity spike tears across the field.

name: Phase Veil
description: Briefly phase out of normal visibility.

name: Jet Lunge
description: Boost forward and crash into melee range.

name: Adrenal Surge
description: Push the body into dangerous overdrive.

name: Repair Burst
description: Patch wounds, armor seals, and shield conduits with a directed repair cloud.

name: Shock Dart
description: A compact dart that shocks muscles and circuitry.

name: Ghost Step
description: A fast slide into broken sightlines.

name: Overclock Nerves
description: Synthel neurology spikes reactions for a short burst.

name: Bulwark Stance
description: Brace and hold against incoming force.

name: Eclipse Gaze
description: A stare that presses on hidden fear circuits.

name: Burst Fire
description: Three fast shots, one ugly result.

name: Drain Essence
description: Drain the life force from your target.
